microwave_time.user_tendencies: IF eating alone AND in a hurry AND food is meat THEN 3 min BECAUSE hotter meat is preferred for quick meals. IF eating in a social setting AND relaxed AND food is dessert THEN no microwave BECAUSE desserts are preferred at room temperature in social settings. IF watching television AND neutral AND food is fruit THEN 1 min BECAUSE fruits are preferred closer to room temperature. IF working on a laptop AND energetic AND food is with sauces THEN 3 min BECAUSE warmer food is preferred to maintain focus. IF eating alone AND fatigued AND food is dessert THEN no microwave BECAUSE less effort is needed with room temperature desserts.

occlusion_relevance.user_tendencies: IF eating in a social setting AND relaxed AND any food THEN minimize left occlusion BECAUSE it is important to maintain social interaction. IF watching television AND neutral AND any food THEN minimize front occlusion BECAUSE it is important to keep the TV visible. IF working on a laptop AND in a hurry AND any food THEN do not consider occlusion BECAUSE efficiency is prioritized. IF eating alone AND fatigued AND any food THEN minimize front occlusion BECAUSE it reduces distractions. IF eating alone AND energetic AND food is with sauces THEN do not consider occlusion BECAUSE focus is on the meal.

robot_speed.user_tendencies: IF eating in a social setting AND in a hurry AND any food THEN fast BECAUSE quicker interactions are preferred. IF watching television AND relaxed AND any food THEN slow BECAUSE it allows for a more leisurely pace. IF working on a laptop AND energetic AND any food THEN fast BECAUSE it matches the user's energy level. IF eating alone AND fatigued AND food is meat THEN medium BECAUSE it balances speed and effort. IF eating alone AND neutral AND food is dessert THEN slow BECAUSE desserts are enjoyed at a leisurely pace.

skewering_axis.user_tendencies: IF eating in a social setting AND relaxed AND food is meat THEN perpendicular to major axis BECAUSE it increases bite acquisition success. IF watching television AND neutral AND food is fruit THEN parallel to major axis BECAUSE it produces easier-to-eat bites. IF working on a laptop AND energetic AND food is with sauces THEN perpendicular to major axis BECAUSE it ensures successful dipping. IF eating alone AND fatigued AND food is dessert THEN parallel to major axis BECAUSE it requires less effort. IF eating alone AND in a hurry AND food is meat THEN perpendicular to major axis BECAUSE it ensures quicker bite acquisition.

web_interface_confirmation.user_tendencies: IF eating in a social setting AND relaxed AND any food THEN yes BECAUSE it ensures precise control in social settings. IF watching television AND neutral AND any food THEN no BECAUSE it minimizes interruptions. IF working on a laptop AND energetic AND any food THEN yes BECAUSE it allows the user to multitask. IF eating alone AND fatigued AND any food THEN no BECAUSE it reduces effort. IF eating alone AND in a hurry AND food is with sauces THEN yes BECAUSE it ensures successful dipping.

transfer_mode.user_tendencies: IF eating in a social setting AND relaxed AND any food THEN outside mouth transfer BECAUSE it is less intrusive. IF watching television AND neutral AND any food THEN inside mouth transfer BECAUSE it minimizes distractions. IF working on a laptop AND energetic AND any food THEN inside mouth transfer BECAUSE it allows for efficient eating. IF eating alone AND fatigued AND any food THEN inside mouth transfer BECAUSE it requires less effort. IF eating alone AND in a hurry AND food is with sauces THEN outside mouth transfer BECAUSE it reduces mess.

outside_mouth_distance.user_tendencies: IF eating in a social setting AND relaxed AND any food THEN medium BECAUSE it allows for comfortable interaction. IF watching television AND neutral AND any food THEN near BECAUSE it minimizes distractions. IF working on a laptop AND energetic AND any food THEN near BECAUSE it allows for efficient eating. IF eating alone AND fatigued AND any food THEN near BECAUSE it requires less effort. IF eating alone AND in a hurry AND food is with sauces THEN medium BECAUSE it reduces mess.

robot_ready_cue.user_tendencies: IF eating in a social setting AND relaxed AND any food THEN speech + LED BECAUSE it ensures clear communication. IF watching television AND neutral AND any food THEN LED BECAUSE it is less disruptive. IF working on a laptop AND energetic AND any food THEN speech BECAUSE it provides clear acknowledgment. IF eating alone AND fatigued AND any food THEN speech BECAUSE it is easier to perceive. IF eating alone AND in a hurry AND food is with sauces THEN speech + LED BECAUSE it ensures clear communication.

skewering_axis.rationale: Parallel skewering produces easier-to-eat bites, which is suitable given the user's limited mouth opening.

transfer_mode.rationale: Inside mouth transfer requires less effort for the user, which is beneficial given their physical limitations and fatigue.

wait_before_autocontinue_seconds.rationale: A longer wait time reduces effort and allows the user to proceed at their own pace, which is suitable given their fatigue.

web_interface_confirmation.rationale: The user cannot reliably press buttons, so avoiding web interface confirmation reduces effort.

amount_to_dip.rationale: Dipping is not performed, so this is not applicable.

bite_completion_drinking.rationale: Using perception reduces the user's effort in signaling completion.

bite_completion_feeding.rationale: Using perception reduces the user's effort in signaling completion.

bite_dipping_preference.rationale: Fatigue suggests minimizing effort, so dipping is avoided.

microwave_time.rationale: The strawberries are intended to be served cold, so minimal microwaving is preferred.

occlusion_relevance.rationale: While working on a laptop, efficiency is prioritized over occlusion.

outside_mouth_distance.rationale: Inside mouth transfer mandates a near distance.

retract_between_bites.rationale: Not retracting reduces effort for the user.
